currentFocus: Stabilize the Codex-first development harness for the Spexor workspace.
startupRoutine: Confirm cwd and clean/dirty git state.
Read this file and pick the highest-priority open task.
Run the smallest relevant verification command before editing.
Run the matching guard command before declaring completion.
